output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 8/8.
Batch 1: Executed batch 1 task T1 in `AgentChat.tsx`. Added `QueuedMessage` and hardened `OptimisticMessage` types, introduced queue state scaffolding, added `createMessageId()` with `crypto.randomUUID()` fallback, verified `AgentTurn.timestamp` is an ISO string and now parse it before optimistic-clear comparison, and rewrote the optimistic-clear effect so it only clears after turn-count growth plus matching text and timestamp. I also confirmed the later gating/cleanup touchpoints for follow-up batches at the new-session, cancel, input-disabled, and send-disabled paths. Verification: `npm test -- AgentChat` is currently failing for a pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx`; `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; repo-wide `npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` reports many unrelated pre-existing errors outside this feature area. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Executed batch 2 task T2 in `AgentChat.tsx`. I extracted `sendNow(item)` so optimistic send metadata is snapped at actual send time, added the required id-matched optimistic clear in the error path, and reworked `handleSend(rawText?)` to snapshot attachments into a `QueuedMessage`, enqueue while the send path is busy, and only send immediately when idle. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_2.json`. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the known pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` (`useLocation()` outside a Router).
Batch 3: Executed batch 3 task T3 in `AgentChat.tsx`. I added the queue-drain `useEffect` so queued messages only auto-send when the chat is idle, the head item is awaited before any dequeue happens, and failed sends intentionally remain at the front of the queue. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_3.json`. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the known pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` (`useLocation()` outside a Router).
Batch 4: Executed batch 4 task T4 in `AgentChat.tsx`. I added the queued-message stack above the clip attachment strip, wired local up/down/delete handlers, and rendered each queued item with line-clamped text, an attachment count badge, and boundary-disabled reorder controls. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_4.json`. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the known pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` (`useLocation()` outside a Router).
Batch 5: Executed batch 5 task T5 in `AgentChat.tsx`. I removed the processing/pending send gates from the text input and send button so users can keep typing and submit queued messages while the current turn is still running, and I updated the placeholder to switch into queue mode whenever the chat is busy. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_5.json`. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the known pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` (`useLocation()` outside a Router).
Batch 6: Batch 6 executed. Queue and optimistic chat state now clear on cancel, on explicit new-session creation, and whenever the active session id changes. Checkpoint written to .megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_6.json.
Batch 7: Batch 7 executed. AgentChat.test.tsx now uses a router-backed render helper and includes queue coverage for typing while processing, attachment snapshotting, duplicate-text optimistic clearing, failed-head retention/removal, and reorder/delete behavior. Checkpoint written to .megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_7.json.
Batch 8: Batch 8 executed. The remaining queue bug is fixed in AgentChat.tsx: failed queued heads now pause the drain while they remain at the front of the queue, and deleting that failed head allows the next queued message to send. Feature-level verification is green: npm test -- AgentChat passes, and a temporary /tmp/verify-agentchat-queue.sh verifier was created, run against the queue-processing, duplicate-text, and forced-error scenarios, and then deleted. Checkpoint written to .megaplan/plans/add-a-message-queue-to-the-20260414-1343/execution_batch_8.json.
deviations: `npm test -- AgentChat` is not green in the current baseline: `AgentChat.test.tsx` renders `AgentChat` without a Router, so `useLocation()` throws before test assertions. This appears unrelated to T1 and was not fixed in this batch.
Repo-wide `npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` reports many unrelated pre-existing TypeScript errors outside `AgentChat`; no broader cleanup was attempted in this batch.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `QueuedMessage` and hardened `OptimisticMessage` in `reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx`, including `id`, `text`, `attachments`, `sentAtMs`, and `priorTurnCount`. Verified `AgentTurn.timestamp` is typed as an ISO string in `reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/types/agent-session.ts`, added `getTurnTimestampMs()` plus `createMessageId()` with `crypto.randomUUID()`/fallback, and rewrote the optimistic-clear effect so it only clears after turn-count growth beyond `priorTurnCount` and a matching later user turn whose parsed timestamp is `>= sentAtMs - 1000`. Confirmed the later gating/cleanup touchpoints remain at the new-session, cancel, input-disabled, and send-disabled sites for follow-up tasks. Verification: `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails due to the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx`; `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes; repo-wide `npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` shows unrelated pre-existing errors outside this feature area.

Extracted `sendNow(item)` in `src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` and moved optimistic-message setup into that callback so `priorTurnCount` and `sentAtMs` are snapped at send time. `sendNow` now clears `optimisticMessage` by id-match in its catch path and always releases `sendingRef` in finally. Reworked `handleSend(rawText?)` to snapshot attachments from the current clip selection into a `QueuedMessage`, clear the draft only for typed sends, enqueue while busy (`sendingRef`, `isProcessing`, `sendMessage.isPending`, `optimisticMessage`, or existing queue), and otherwise call `sendNow` immediately. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes. `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` where `useLocation()` is called outside a Router.

Added the queue-drain `useEffect` in `src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx`. It now exits while a send is in flight, the agent is processing, the mutation is pending, an optimistic message is still active, the queue is empty, or there is no active session/timeline. When idle, it reads `queue[0]`, awaits `sendNow(next)`, and only then removes the head with a `prev[0]?.id === next.id ? prev.slice(1) : prev` guard so failed sends remain visible and reorder races do not drop the wrong item. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes. `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` where `useLocation()` is called outside a Router.

Rendered the queued-message stack in `src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` immediately above the clip attachment strip and added local reorder/delete handlers. Each queued row now shows line-clamped text, a `📎 N` attachment badge when attachments exist, disabled up/down controls at the boundaries, and an `X` remove control. Styling uses design tokens (`bg-muted/50`, `bg-background/80`, existing button variants) with no hardcoded colors. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes. `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` where `useLocation()` is called outside a Router.

Updated the input/send gating in `src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` so typing remains enabled during agent processing and the send button is no longer blocked by `isProcessing` or `sendMessage.isPending`. The input placeholder now switches to queue-aware copy when the agent is busy or items are already queued. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes. `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` where `useLocation()` is called outside a Router.

Updated src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx so queue and optimistic state are cleared in all required reset paths: the cancel button now clears both before calling cancelSession.mutate(), handleNewSession() clears both before creating a replacement session, and a new useEffect clears both whenever activeSessionId changes. Verification: npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx passes. npm test -- AgentChat still fails on the pre-existing Router harness issue in AgentChat.test.tsx where useLocation() is called outside a Router.

Updated src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.test.tsx to wrap AgentChat in a MemoryRouter, preserve the existing mock-hook pattern, and add coverage for queueing while processing, queued attachment snapshotting, duplicate-text optimistic clearing, failed-head queue retention/removal, and reorder/delete interactions. Verification: npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.test.tsx passes. npm test -- AgentChat now gets past the prior Router harness failure and fails only the new FLAG-001 regression test (keeps a failed head queued, shows an error, and only resumes draining after the failed head is removed) because the component retries the failed head instead of pausing until removal.

Updated src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx to prevent queued-send auto-retries after a failure by tracking a paused failed-head id and blocking the drain while that item remains at the front of the queue; removing the failed head clears the pause and resumes draining. Verification: npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.test.tsx passes, npm test -- AgentChat passes, and a temporary /tmp/verify-agentchat-queue.sh script was written, run to confirm the processing/duplicate-text/failed-head scenarios, and deleted. Final repo-wide checks still fail due to unrelated pre-existing issues outside this feature: npm run lint reports many existing lint errors across unrelated domains/files, and npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit reports existing type errors outside AgentChat.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `OptimisticMessage` now includes `id`, `text`, `attachments`, `sentAtMs`, and `priorTurnCount`, and the clear effect now requires turn-count growth plus content match plus parsed timestamp comparison rather than text-only matching.

Yes. `sendNow` now captures `priorTurnCount` and `sentAtMs` at call time, clears `optimisticMessage` only when the ids match in catch, and always releases `sendingRef` in finally. `handleSend` now snapshots attachments from the current clips, queues whenever the send path is busy, and sends immediately only when idle.

Yes. The drain effect awaits `sendNow(next)` before slicing the queue, uses `prev[0]?.id === next.id` when removing the head, leaves failed items at the front by catching without slicing, and will naturally re-fire once `optimisticMessage` clears because that state is in the dependency list and the early-return guard.

Yes. Queued cards now render above the clips strip with line-clamped text, a `📎 N` badge for attachments, disabled `ChevronUp`/`ChevronDown` boundary controls, and an `X` delete button, all styled with design tokens rather than hardcoded colors.

Yes. `isProcessing` and `sendMessage.isPending` were removed from the input/send disabled conditions while the existing timeline/session/cancelled/voice guards remain, and the placeholder now changes to queue-aware copy whenever processing is active, the mutation is pending, or queued messages exist.
Yes. The cancel button, handleNewSession(), and a new activeSessionId effect now all clear both queue and optimisticMessage.

Yes. The new tests cover typing while processing without immediate mutateAsync calls, attachment snapshotting when the queue drains, duplicate-text optimistic clearing, failed-head retention plus delete-to-resume behavior, and reorder/delete UI updates. The failed-head case is currently red and exposes the remaining FLAG-001 behavior gap.

Yes. npm test -- AgentChat passes, and a temporary /tmp/verify-agentchat-queue.sh verifier was created, run to confirm the queue-while-processing, duplicate-text, and forced-error scenarios, and then deleted.
